---
name: Hosted-tier interest
about: Interested in a hosted version of this server (no local setup)?
title: "[HOSTED INTEREST] "
labels: hosted-interest
---

We're gauging interest in a hosted version of this MCP server — no local
`npx`/API key setup, a managed endpoint, and higher rate limits than the
free USDA tier. If that's useful to you, tell us a bit about your use case:

**What would you use it for?**


**What would you expect to pay for this** (rough range is fine — free,
$5/mo, usage-based, etc.)?


**Expected volume** (roughly how many food lookups per day/month?)


**Contact** (optional — email or another way to reach you if we follow up)
